name: Regex Toolkit
description: 10 browser-based regex utilities — test, replace, extract, explain, validate, highlight matches, view named capture groups, generate patterns, browse a common patterns library, and reference the full cheat sheet. Zero server calls.
author: Shamrouz Awan

meta.title: Regex Toolkit — 10 Free Online Regular Expression Tools
meta.description: Test, replace, extract, explain and generate regular expressions instantly in your browser. Includes cheat sheet, pattern library, named groups viewer and more.
